arts.ttl: Manchester United stepping up efforts to sign Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: Manchester United are ramping up their efforts to secure the signature of Nigerian striker Victor Osimhen in the January transfer window. The Red Devils are exploring innovative strategies to bring the Napoli forward to Old Trafford, including potential player exchanges to offset costs. The post Manchester United stepping up efforts to sign Victor Osimhen appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man Utd supporters sent travel warning ahead of Liverpool clash after snowfall as update given
arts.sum: Manchester United make the reasonably short trip to Liverpool this afternoon for the Premier League clash at Anfield

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford latest: European giants 'emerge' as contenders while surprise team 'join the race'
arts.sum: AC Milan reportedly consider making a loan move for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Mocked Man Utd flop demands to leave this month
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee has demanded to leave Man Utd this month after he was mocked in the 2-0 defeat at home to Newcastle on Monday. Juventus are the favourites to sign Zirkzee on loan in January as the Dutchman worked successfully with Bianconeri manager Thiago Motta at Bologna last season.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot has informed “rapid” Liverpool player he is free to leave
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Ben Doak has been informed that he is free to leave the club midway through the season. Crystal Palace and Ipswich are keen on signing the 19-year-old attacker. They have already had offers of around £15 million and £16 million rejected for the player. It will be interesting to see if they decide […] The post Arne Slot has informed “rapid” Liverpool player he is free to leave appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man United could be called OFF amid amber weather warning after snow as urgent safety meeting is called
arts.sum: An amber weather warning has been issued for Liverpool and Manchester by the Met Office, the same level that was issued ahead of the cancelled Merseyside derby in December.

arts.ttl: I am a Liverpool legend - Sir Alex Ferguson regrets never signing me but I would not have gone
arts.sum: John Barnes has recalled how he was nearly signed by Sir Alex Ferguson at Manchester United - but the Liverpool legend says he would never have moved to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk's private chat leaked after he spoke about Man Utd
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk has been a colossus at Liverpool since his world-record move from Southampton in January 2018 - but his career could have taken a completely different turn

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'could miss out on £50million' depending on Trent Alexander-Arnold decision
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has Real Madrid keen on bringing him to La Liga in 2025, and if the Liverpool star does go, Manchester United could miss out on the chance for a big windfall

arts.ttl: ‘It’s so depressing’: Manchester United fans open up on club’s malaise
arts.sum: Liverpool host a disjointed side bereft of form but United supporters are keen to get behind Ruben Amorim Manchester United’s recent trips to Liverpool have been gruesome occasions for their supporters. It has been nine years since United last won away at their fiercest rivals and they have failed to score in their past five visits to Anfield, losing 4-0 and 7-0 in that time. United fans could be forgiven for plunging to new levels of pessimism for this latest mission to Merseyside, given current circumstances. While Liverpool are streaking clear at the Premier League summit via a seamless transition under Arne Slot, United are staring down the barrel of a fifth successive defeat and a seventh in 12 games under Ruben Amorim.
